article.description: — Donovan Mitchell scored 23 points, James Harden added 20 and the Cleveland Cavaliers pulled away in the second half for a 109-94 victory over the New York Knicks on Tuesday night.
article.headline: Cavaliers pull away in second half for 109-94 victory over Knicks

images.caption: Kendrick Perkins voices his concern with the Knicks after their loss to the Cavaliers on Tuesday night.
images.name: Perk: Knicks should be in 'full-out panic mode'

article.linkText: Cavaliers pull away in second half for 109-94 victory over Knicks
article.story: CLEVELAND -- — Donovan Mitchell scored 23 points, James Harden added 20 and the Cleveland Cavaliers pulled away in the second half for a 109-94 victory over the New York Knicks on Tuesday night. Jarrett Allen had 19 points and 10 rebounds as the Cavaliers won for the eighth time in nine games. Jalen Brunson had 20 points and Mikal Bridges scored 18 for the Knicks. Mitchell Robinson pulled down 15 rebounds, one off a season high. New York shot 35 of 86 as Bridges and Brunson were a combined 12 of 36. The Knicks shot 27% from 3-point range (10 of 37). Cleveland came into the game with the fourth-worst defense in the league on 3-pointers. The Cavaliers and Knicks are both 37-22 and tied for third place in the Eastern Conference. But New York would have the head-to-head tiebreaker edge if the teams are tied at the end of the season after taking two of three meetings. Cleveland had a 60-54 halftime advantage before taking control in the third quarter. It outscored New York 23-11 in the period, and held the Knicks to 3 of 24 from the field. Harden had eight points in the quarter and Allen scored six. It was the worst shooting quarter by the Knicks since they went 3 of 20 in the fourth quarter of a 2018 game against Boston. The last time the Cavaliers held a team to three or fewer field goals was last season against Minnesota (2 of 20). Cleveland was up 71-63 before going on a 13-2 run during a five-minute span late in the third and early in the fourth. The Cavaliers' largest lead was 98-78 midway through the fourth quarter. Up next Knicks: At Milwaukee on Friday. Cavaliers: At Milwaukee on Wednesday to start a three-game road trip. ------ AP NBA: https://apnews.com/hub/nba

videos.description: New York Knicks vs. Cleveland Cavaliers: Game Highlights
videos.headline: New York Knicks vs. Cleveland Cavaliers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (New York Knicks vs. Cleveland Cavaliers: Game Highlights) 2026/02/25 ESHEET

videos.description: James Harden threads the needle to Jarrett Allen, who somehow gets the and-1 to fall for the Cavaliers.
videos.headline: Jarrett Allen somehow gets the and-1 to fall

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jarrett Allen somehow gets the and-1 to fall) 2026/02/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Donovan Mitchell cuts to the basket and throws down a powerful slam dunk for the Cavaliers.
videos.headline: Donovan Mitchell rocks the rim for the Cavaliers

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Donovan Mitchell rocks the rim for the Cavaliers) 2026/02/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Donovan Mitchell finds Dean Wade, who sinks a buzzer-beating 3-pointer to end the first quarter.
videos.headline: Dean Wade’s triple beats the shot clock

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Dean Wade’s triple beats the shot clock 2026/02/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Karl-Anthony Towns gets to the rim and draws the and-1 for the Knicks.
videos.headline: Karl-Anthony Towns gets the hoop and the harm

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Karl-Anthony Towns gets the hoop and the harm) 2026/02/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Dennis Schroder throws a no-look pass to Jaylon Tyson, who finishes with a slam dunk for the Cavaliers.
videos.headline: Dennis Schroder’s no-look pass sets up Jaylon Tyson's slam

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Dennis Schroder’s no-look pass sets up Jaylon Tyson's slam) 2026/02/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Jose Alvarado throws an alley-oop to Mitchell Robinson for an easy Knicks bucket.
videos.headline: Mitchell Robinson finishes alley-oop jam

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Mitchell Robinson finishes alley-oop jam) 2026/02/25 ESHEET

videos.description: OG Anunoby elevates and finishes with a two-handed slam dunk for the Knicks.
videos.headline: OG Anunoby finishes with 2-handed slam

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (OG Anunoby finishes with 2-handed slam) 2026/02/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Jarrett Allen gets a steal and finishes with a slam dunk for an easy Cavaliers bucket.
videos.headline: Jarrett Allen rocks the rim for Cavaliers

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jarrett Allen rocks the rim for Cavaliers) 2026/02/25 ESHEET

videos.description: James Harden knocks down a corner 3-pointer to extend the Cavaliers' lead.
videos.headline: James Harden’s corner 3 extends the Cavaliers' lead

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (James Harden’s corner 3 extends the Cavaliers' lead) 2026/02/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Jaylon Tyson sinks a contested floater and beats the shot clock for a Cavaliers bucket.
videos.headline: Jaylon Tyson beats shot clock with floater

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jaylon Tyson beats shot clock with floater) 2026/02/25 ESHEET

videos.description: James Harden highlights vs. New York Knicks
videos.headline: James Harden highlights vs. New York Knicks

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (James Harden highlights vs. New York Knicks) 2026/02/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Donovan Mitchell scores 23 points and lifts the Cavaliers to a 109–94 win over the Knicks.
videos.headline: Donovan Mitchell’s 23 points lead the Cavs to victory

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Donovan Mitchell’s 23 points lead the Cavs to victory) 2026/02/25 ESHEET
